parameters-en.Sensitivity: Controls the filter envelope's input sensitivity. Higher values are more sensitive to your playing dynamics.
parameters-en.Frequency: Sets the highest frequency in the filter sweep. Higher values are more extreme.
parameters-en.Resonance: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency band affected by the filters.
parameters-en.Attack: Controls how long it takes for the filter to sweep down (the Attack stage) before sweeping back up (the Release stage). Lower values result in a longer downward filter sweep. Is somewhat interactive with the Sensitivity parameter.
parameters-en.Release: Controls how long it takes for the filter to sweep back up (the Release Stage) after first sweeping down (the Attack stage).
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
